t_ch: 我也有此意。树庭现在危机四伏，多一个人就多了一层保障。
t_en: I was thinking the same thing. The Grove is fraught with danger right now, and an extra pair of hands translates to extra security.

t_ch: 不愧是「列车护卫」，真可靠呀。那，我们走吧？
t_en: That's the dependable "Express Guard" for you. So, shall we get going?

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: What's this...?

t_ch: 对，这就是天空一族的圣物，「彩虹匣」。
t_en: This is the divine object of the Sky people, the Chroma Coffer.

t_ch: 根据祖训，当天空之子的后裔准备好再次挑战{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}时…她必须先以彩虹匣苏醒先祖的英魂，并获得他们的赐福。
t_en: Our ancestors dictated that when a descendant of the Skyfolk is ready to challenge {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} again... they must first awaken the spirits of their ancestors with the Chroma Coffer and receive their benediction.

t_ch: 只有在完成这一步以后，被选中的天空之子才能重登天空。
t_en: Only after this can the chosen Skyfolk re-ascend to the heavens.

t_ch: 是为了防止不够资格的人白白丢了性命吗？
t_en: Is it to prevent those who are not qualified from pointlessly losing their lives?

t_ch: 很聪明谨慎的做法，对吧？
t_en: Very prudent, wouldn't you say?

t_ch: 这里沉睡着一位先祖的灵魂…现在，我要唤醒他了。
t_en: The soul of an ancestor slumbers here... Now, I will awaken them.

t_ch: 嗯。
t_en: Right.
...Doot.

t_ch: 我是昏光庭院的雅辛忒丝，继承逐火使命的天空后裔。
t_en: I am Hyacinthia from the Twilight Courtyard, a descendant of the Sky who has inherited the duty of Flame-Chase.

t_ch: 兑现我族命运的时间已到，我将和神谕中的英雄们一道重返天空，取回火种。
t_en: The time has come to fulfill our clan's destiny. I will join the heroes of the prophecy to return to the sky and retrieve the Coreflame.

t_ch: 先祖啊，请您给予慷慨的赐福吧……
t_en: Ancestor, please bestow upon me your generous blessing...

t_ch: 仔细聆听风堇与先祖的交谈。
t_en: Listen carefully to Hyacine talk with the ancestor.

t_ch: 从远处见证风堇收集赐福。
t_en: Witness Hyacine collect blessings from afar.

t_ch: 风堇通过彩虹匣召唤出了先祖的英魂……
t_en: Hyacine used the Chroma Coffer to summon the heroic spirit of the ancestor...

t_ch: 一番交谈过后，她从裁判官克里斯普斯处获得了第一道天空赐福。
t_en: After a discussion, she obtained the first sky blessing from Magistrate Crispus.

t_ch: 下一位要去拜访的先祖…据说她的英魂留在了创世涡心。可惜仪式必须按顺序进行，要搭伙回奥赫玛吗，丹宝？
t_en: Now, the next ancestor on the list... her spirit is said to rest in the Vortex of Genesis. A pity that the ceremony has to be performed in strict order. Shall we head back to Okhema together, Dannie?

t_ch: 创世涡心么……
t_en: The Vortex of Genesis, huh...

t_ch: 那我倒是有个提议。
t_en: I have a suggestion.
Hmm...?

t_ch: 还记得么？一段时间以前，你推荐我学习法吉娜祭司们的「灵水秘术」……
t_en: Remember how you suggested I learn the "secret arts of water" from Phagousa's priests?

t_ch: 我用闲暇时间研习，取得了一些阶段性的成果。<color=#dbc291ff>现在，只要随身携带「灵水」，我就能用秘术开拓出通向创世涡心的通路</color>。
t_en: I've been practicing that in my spare time and made some progress. <color=#dbc291ff>Now, as long as I have spirit water with me, I can use those techniques to carve a path directly to the Vortex of Genesis</color>.

t_ch: 啊，我还记得！没想到你会一直坚持到现在，真不愧是丹宝。
t_en: Ah, I remember! I didn't expect you to keep at it this long — that's so like you, Dannie.

t_ch: 和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
t_en: Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.

t_ch: 毕竟在神话里，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}本就是一位阴晴不定的泰坦嘛。
t_en: That makes sense. {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} was always described as a fickle Titan in the myths.

t_ch: 既然丹宝都这么建议了…那我就来验收下你的学习成果吧？
t_en: Since you're offering... then let me put your skills to the test, Dannie.

t_ch: 用秘术临时创造的灵水之门远不如祭仪水盆那般稳定，<color=#dbc291ff>恐怕只能允许一人通过。</color>
t_en: The spirit water gate formed with this technique isn't as stable as a ritual basin. It'll <color=#dbc291ff>likely only let one person through.</color>

t_ch: 以及，根据法吉娜祭司们的设计——「入口亦为出口」。待你见完先祖的灵魂，就通过涡心回到这里吧——我和小伊卡会在原地等你。
t_en: And as Phagousa's priests designed it — "the entrance serves as the exit." You'll need to come back through the vortex once you've met your ancestor's spirit. Little Ica and I will be here waiting.

t_ch: 嘟…嘟嘟！
t_en: Doot... Doot-Doot!

t_ch: 我明白啦。那就拜托你了，丹宝！
t_en: Got it. I'm counting on you, Dannie!

t_ch: 「…于它狂欢的舞步之下，以盛会的喧嚣掩盖世界的心跳。」
t_en: "...Under the raucous steps of their frenzied dance, the roar of celebration hides the world's heartbeat."

t_ch: 「灵水，揭露门扉吧——」
t_en: "Spirit water, reveal the way —"

t_ch: 是谁…唤醒了我？
t_en: Who... has awakened me?

t_ch: 是我，雅辛忒丝，天空一族的后裔。很抱歉打断了您的酣眠。
t_en: It's I, Hyacinthia, a descendant of the Sky people. I apologize for interrupting your slumber.

t_ch: 您是克里斯普斯阁下，对吗？我在族谱上读到过您的故事。听说您曾是一位正直的裁判官，为许多遭受诬告的公民洗刷了冤屈。
t_en: You are Lord Crispus, aren't you? I've read your story in our family tree. You were a righteous judge who vindicated many who were wrongfully accused.

t_ch: 啊…没想到在这个陌生的时代，还能有人记得我的名字。
t_en: Ah... I never imagined someone in this era would still remember my name.

t_ch: 我们的血脉和使命…一直延续到了这遥远的年代啊。
t_en: So, our bloodline and duty have continued to this distant age...

t_ch: 没错。我之所以会叫醒您，就是希望能够取得您的祝福。
t_en: Indeed it has. I have awakened you in the hope of receiving your blessing.

t_ch: 因为逐火之旅将在我的眼前走向完满的结局，而取得{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种则是英雄们将要面临的最后一重挑战。
t_en: For the Flame-Chase Journey is nearing its perfect conclusion, and retrieving the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} is the final challenge the heroes will face.

t_ch: 完满的结局…？
t_en: Perfect conclusion...?

t_ch: 雅辛忒丝，你很年轻…而且，你的模样也不像是能与泰坦抗衡的斗士。
t_en: Hyacinthia, you look very young... and you do not have the bearings of a warrior who can contend with a Titan.

t_ch: 你要如何令我确信，这祝福不会变成诅咒，反而铺就一位年轻后嗣的绝路？
t_en: How can you convince me that this blessing will not turn into a curse, leading a child like you to your demise?

t_ch: 千年以前，<color=#dbc291ff>征服天空的塞涅俄丝留下了传说和遗志，把归还天空泰坦火种的使命交给了自己的后人——您和我。</color>
t_en: A thousand years ago, <color=#dbc291ff>Seliose who conquered the skies left behind legends and a will, entrusting the mission to return the Sky Titan's Coreflame to her descendants — to people like you and me.</color>

t_ch: 我虽然不是一名战士，但也绝对不会逃避在血脉中流淌了千年的使命。
t_en: Though I'm not a warrior, I will not turn away from the mission that has flowed through our blood for a thousand years.

t_ch: 何况我并非孤军奋战…在我身边，聚集了这世上最强大，最坚韧的伙伴们。
t_en: And I am not fighting alone... I have the strongest and most tenacious companions in the world.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯已经迎来了一个英雄辈出的时代！取回{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}火种的重担，已经不需要由被选中的天空之子独自承担了。
t_en: Amphoreus is in an era brimming with heroes! The burden of retrieving {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame no longer rests solely on the shoulders of the chosen Skyfolk.
Mmm...

t_ch: 我现在掌握了治愈的力量。我想要缝合天空的裂隙，疗愈人们的伤痛。
t_en: I now wield the power of healing. I aim to mend the fissures in the sky and heal the wounds of the people.

t_ch: 我想以自己的意志去诠释天空后裔的使命…以我的方式，为跨越千年的守望画上句号。
t_en: I desire to define the mission of the Skyfolk in my own terms... to conclude the vigil that has spanned millennia.

t_ch: 从你的话语里，我感受到了坚韧…并非流于外表，而是包蕴于心。
t_en: I sense resilience in your words... not an outward resilience, but something deeper within.

t_ch: 接下我的赐福吧，年轻的雅辛忒丝。愿你能获得羽翼，搭乘彩虹之桥重返天空。
t_en: Receive my blessings, young Hyacinthia. May you gain wings to return to the sky via the bridge of rainbows.

t_ch: 感谢您的信任，克里斯普斯阁下。我们一定不会辜负期望……
t_en: Thank you for your trust, Lord Crispus. We won't let you down...

t_ch: …做得好，风堇。
t_en: ...Well done, Hyacine.

t_ch: 嘿…谢谢夸奖。
t_en: Heh... Thank you.

t_ch: 我的先祖们都是些强直的人物，想要说服他们并不容易。同他们见面的一幕幕，我已经在心中演练过无数次啦。
t_en: My ancestors were all pretty strong-willed people. It won't be easy convincing them. I've run through these upcoming conversations in my head more times than I can count.

t_ch: 看来你的努力没有白费。
t_en: Looks like your efforts paid off.

t_ch: 下一位要去拜访的先祖…据说她的英魂留在了创世涡心。可惜仪式必须按顺序进行，要搭伙回奥赫玛吗，丹宝？
t_en: Now, the next ancestor on the list... her spirit is said to rest in the Vortex of Genesis. A pity that the ceremony has to be performed in strict order. Shall we head back to Okhema together, Dannie?

t_ch: 创世涡心么……
t_en: The Vortex of Genesis, huh...

t_ch: 那我倒是有个提议。
t_en: I have a suggestion.
Mmm...?

t_ch: 还记得么？一段时间以前，你推荐我学习法吉娜祭司们的「灵水秘术」……
t_en: Remember how you suggested I learn the "secret arts of water" from Phagousa's priests?

t_ch: 我用闲暇时间研习，取得了一些阶段性的成果。<color=#dbc291ff>现在，只要随身携带「灵水」，我就能用秘术开拓出通向创世涡心的通路</color>。
t_en: I've been practicing that in my spare time and made some progress. <color=#dbc291ff>Now, as long as I have spirit water with me, I can use those techniques to carve a path directly to the Vortex of Genesis</color>.

t_ch: 啊，我还记得！没想到你会一直坚持到现在，真不愧是丹宝。
t_en: Ah, I remember! I didn't expect you to keep at it this long — that's so like you, Dannie.

t_ch: 和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
t_en: Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.

t_ch: 毕竟在神话里，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}本就是一位阴晴不定的泰坦嘛。
t_en: That makes sense. {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} was always described as a fickle Titan in the myths.

t_ch: 既然丹宝都这么建议了…那我就来验收下你的学习成果吧？
t_en: Since you're offering... then let me put your skills to the test, Dannie.

t_ch: 用秘术临时创造的灵水之门远不如祭仪水盆那般稳定，<color=#dbc291ff>恐怕只能允许一人通过。</color>
t_en: The spirit water gate formed with this technique isn't as stable as a ritual basin. It'll <color=#dbc291ff>likely only let one person through.</color>

t_ch: 以及，根据法吉娜祭司们的设计——「入口亦为出口」。待你见完先祖的灵魂，就通过涡心回到这里吧——我和小伊卡会在原地等你。
t_en: And as Phagousa's priests designed it — "the entrance serves as the exit." You'll need to come back through the vortex once you've met your ancestor's spirit. Little Ica and I will be here waiting.

t_ch: 嘟…嘟嘟！
t_en: Doot... Doot-Doot!

t_ch: 我明白啦。那就拜托你了，丹宝！
t_en: Got it. I'm counting on you, Dannie!

t_ch: 「…于它狂欢的舞步之下，以盛会的喧嚣掩盖世界的心跳。」
t_en: "...Under the raucous steps of their frenzied dance, the roar of celebration hides the world's heartbeat."

t_ch: 「灵水，揭露门扉吧——」
t_en: "Spirit water, reveal the way —"

t_ch: 创世涡心…真是不可思议，丹宝果真深藏不露呢。
t_en: The Vortex of Genesis... unbelievable. Dannie is full of surprises.

t_ch: 就是…和祭仪水盆相比…眩晕感确实有些强烈。
t_en: But... This does feel way more disorienting than the ritual basin...

t_ch: 缇宝老师也在？在她身边那位……
t_en: Wait, is Lady Tribbie here too? And who is that next to her...?

t_ch: 啊——我大概能猜到那是谁啦。
t_en: Ah. I think I know who that is.

t_ch: …飞儿，你这就要急着赶路了吗？
t_en: ...Do you have to go already, Ciphy?

t_ch: 好不容易回来奥赫玛一趟，你本可以好好休息一阵的，我们一起叙叙旧……
t_en: It's been ages since you were last in Okhema. You could've taken some time to rest, and we could've caught up...

t_ch: 不用了，缇宝阿姐！我早就过惯了四处漂泊的日子，让我在这熙熙攘攘的大城市留守反倒有些不自在。
t_en: That's alright, big sister Tribbie! I've gotten used to life on the road. Staying in this bustling city actually feels off.

t_ch: 何况，你那位有出息的学生…可是给我派了个超级艰难的任务哪。
t_en: Besides, your prized student... gave me an incredibly tough mission to handle.

t_ch: 你要体谅一下小白呀，飞儿。他还这么年轻，就已经把阿雅留下来的职责全都扛在了肩上……
t_en: Cut Snowy some slack, Ciphy. He's still so young, yet he's shouldering all the responsibilities Agy left behind...

t_ch: 而且，小白可不是那种喜欢随便使唤别人的孩子。他会找到你，就说明这件事没有更合适的人选啦。
t_en: Besides, Snowy's not the kind to ask for help lightly. Since he came to you, it means you're the best person for the job.

t_ch: 你还真是宠溺他啊，缇宝阿姐。唉，可惜我已经过了那个处处需要被护短的年纪咯……
t_en: You really spoil him, big sis Tribbie. Guess I'm past the age for someone to look after me...

t_ch: 飞儿——
t_en: Ciphy —

t_ch: …开个玩笑哈，我懂你的意思。那救世小子身上的确有种让人信服的气质，不输当年的阿格莱雅。
t_en: ...Just kidding, I get it. That Deliverer boy does have a certain charisma about him. It reminds me of Aglaea in her prime.

t_ch: 我这就准备出发了。啊，缇宝阿姐，临走前，我还有个礼物要送给你——
t_en: Anyway, I'm about to head out. Oh, big sis Tribbie, before I go — Got a little gift for you.

t_ch: 哇，没想到你还这么有心…这里面装着什么呀？
t_en: Wow, didn't expect you to be so thoughtful... What's in it?

t_ch: 嘿嘿…这也是游戏的一环哪。想看到这件礼物的完整面貌，<color=#dbc291ff>就等到天黑以后再打开它吧。</color>
t_en: Heh... That's a part of the game too. If you want to see the full picture of what's inside, <color=#dbc291ff>you'll have to wait until nightfall.</color>

t_ch: 送人礼物怎么还带猜谜呀，真是的……
t_en: A gift with a mysterious twist? Seriously?

t_ch: …嗯？看来咱们有搭子了哪。
t_en: ...Hmm? Looks like we have company.

t_ch: 缇宝老师，还有…这位身形轻盈的女士，一定就是赛飞儿小姐吧？
t_en: Lady Tribbie, and... this graceful lady must be Miss Cipher.

t_ch: 我是昏光庭院的雅辛忒丝，大家叫我风堇——很高兴认识您！
t_en: I'm Hyacinthia from the Twilight Courtyard. Everyone calls me Hyacine — pleased to meet you!

t_ch: 啧，这自带的明亮氛围……
t_en: Tsk, bright and cheery as a lamp...

t_ch: …咳，你好，粉彤彤的后辈。我是赛法利娅，来自早就陨落的城邦多洛斯。其它的…史书传记里都写了，也用不着我再介绍了吧？
t_en: ...Ahem. Well, hello there, pink child. I'm Cifera from the long-fallen city-state of Dolos. As for the rest... it's all in the history books, so I don't need to repeat it here.

t_ch: 你说自己来自昏光庭院？也就是说……
t_en: So you're from the Twilight Courtyard? Does that mean...

t_ch: 您没想错。我是天空一族的后嗣，将要接过「天空」权柄的黄金裔。
t_en: Yes, I'm a descendant of the Sky people, the Chrysos Heir about to take over the authority of Sky.

t_ch: 那还真是…人不可貌相。我还以为塞涅俄丝的后裔会更…呃…高大威猛一点儿。
t_en: Well, that's... unexpected. I figured Seliose's descendant would be... I don't know. Taller? Stronger?

t_ch: 不能以貌取人呀，飞儿。小风堇在她的领域可是很厉害的专家哦，整个翁法罗斯都没有比她更靠谱的医师啦。
t_en: Don't judge a book by its cover, Ciphy. Cinny is a master of her craft. She's the most skilled and dependable physician in all of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 请放心吧，赛飞儿女士。虽然我不像千年前的塞涅俄丝大人那样骁勇善战，但我有信心能完成天空后裔的使命。
t_en: Don't worry, Lady Cipher. I may not be as strong and warlike as Lady Seliose from a thousand years ago, but I'm confident I can carry out the mission of the Skyfolk.

t_ch: 哎呀哈，什么使命不使命的，说得那么严肃……
t_en: Ahaha, all this talk about missions... you're making it sound way too serious.

t_ch: 小姑娘，要学会优先保护好自己，别什么事都太拼命哈。瞧这张脸蛋，还挺可爱的，别叫艾格勒的爪子挠花了……
t_en: You've gotta look out for yourself, girl! Don't push yourself too hard. I'd hate to see that cute face all scratched up by Aquila's claws...

t_ch: 飞儿现在也会这样逗人啦？看来你还惦念着阿雅很久以前的话呢。
t_en: Ciphy, cracking jokes? Looks like you haven't forgotten what Agy said all those years ago.

t_ch: …唔，我还有任务在身，先走一步了。
t_en: ...Anyway, I've got a mission to handle, so I'll get going.

t_ch: 祝你成功，风堇姑娘——遇到什么难事，让那个救世小子顶在前面就行！
t_en: Good luck, Miss Hyacine. And if things get tough, just let that Deliverer take the lead!

t_ch: 赛飞儿发动翻飞之币的能力，瞬移离开了涡心……
t_en: Cipher uses the Coin of Whimsy's ability and teleports away from the Vortex...

t_ch: 赛飞儿小姐，真是个急性子呀。
t_en: Miss Cipher is in such a hurry.

t_ch: 她一直都是那样啦，别在意。不管怎样，飞儿她愿意回来奥赫玛帮忙…实在是太好了。
t_en: Don't worry. She's always been like that... It's good to have her back in Okhema lending a hand.

t_ch: 先不说她的事啦。小风堇会来到这里，是因为你身负的使命吧？
t_en: Well, enough about her for now. You're here because of your mission, aren't you, Cinny?

t_ch: 正好，我要去把飞儿送的礼物好好收起来——创世涡心就先让给你啦。
t_en: It's the perfect opportunity for me to go and tuck Ciphy's gift away somewhere safe. The Vortex of Genesis is all yours.

t_ch: …我将和神谕中的英雄们一道重返天空，取回火种。
t_en: ...I will join the heroes of the prophecy to return to the sky and retrieve the Coreflame.

t_ch: 先祖啊，请给予您慷慨的赐福吧……
t_en: Ancestor, please bestow upon me your generous blessing...

t_ch: 与先祖交谈。
t_en: Speak with the ancestor.

t_ch: 略过这段叙述。
t_en: Skip this narration.

t_ch: 风堇通过彩虹匣召唤出了先祖的英魂……
t_en: Hyacine used the Chroma Coffer to summon the heroic spirit of the ancestor...

t_ch: 一番交谈过后，她从特克菈将军处获得了第二道天空赐福。
t_en: After a discussion, she obtained the second sky blessing from General Ektra.

t_ch: 特克菈将军揭示了缇里西庇俄斯曾经留下的预言：<color=#dbc291ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
t_en: General Ektra revealed the prophecy once-foretold by Tribios: <color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>

t_ch: 特克菈将军…和史料中记载的形象反差很大，是一位相当温柔的人呢。
t_en: General Ektra is... so different from how the records described her. She's quite a gentle person.

t_ch: 走吧，该回树庭去了…不能让丹宝和小伊卡担心呀。
t_en: Alright, time to head back to the Grove... I shouldn't keep Dannie and Little Ica waiting.

t_ch: …孩子，为何你会出现在我面前？莫非…你是天空一族的后裔？
t_en: ...Child, what brings you before me? Could it be... you're a descendant of the Sky people?

t_ch: 您没猜错，我是昏光庭院的雅辛忒丝，天空一族逐火使命的继承者。
t_en: Yes. I am Hyacinthia of the Twilight Courtyard, the successor of the Sky people's Flame-Chase duty.

t_ch: 您应该是特克菈将军吧？传说在黄金战争中，您曾率领族人与奥赫玛结盟，抵御悬锋军队的进攻——您的战果为天空一族在圣城赢得了一席之地。
t_en: You must be General Ektra. Legend has it that during the Chrysos War, you led our people to ally with Okhema and held back the Kremnoan forces. It was your victory that earned the Sky people a place in the holy city.

t_ch: 雅辛忒丝么…看来你对我族的族谱十分熟悉啊，孩子。
t_en: Hyacinthia... You seem well-versed in our clan's history.

t_ch: 这里是…创世涡心？
t_en: And this is... the Vortex of Genesis?

t_ch: 对。您看——有十颗星辰已经被点亮，黄金裔的逐火之旅已经临近完成。
t_en: It is. Look — ten stars have already been lit. The Chrysos Heirs' Flame-Chase Journey is nearing its end.

t_ch: 那是…{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的火种？
t_en: Are those... the Coreflames of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 那就是说，<color=#dbc291ff>海瑟音和那位山之民…</color>他们成功履行了自己的使命么？
t_en: Does that mean <color=#dbc291ff>Hysilens and the Mountain Dweller</color> successfully carried out their duty?

t_ch: 呵…同为翁法罗斯的支柱，没想到「天空」的宿命要等到千年之后才能完满啊。
t_en: Heh... Who would've thought, as a fellow pillar of Amphoreus, the Sky's duty could only be fulfilled after a thousand years?

t_ch: 因为「天空」笼庇万物，它若分崩离析，世界也将被碾碎。所以，阿格莱雅大人才会将{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种作为征途的收尾。
t_en: It's because Sky shelters all beneath it. If it were to shatter, the world would fall apart with it. That's why Lady Aglaea made the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} the final step in our campaign.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅…？千年以后？她竟还走在逐火的道路上么……
t_en: Aglaea...? Is she still on the Flame-Chase Journey after a thousand years?

t_ch: …很遗憾，她最近才离开了我们。但您说对了一部分…她的确仍在指引着黄金裔们前行。
t_en: ...Unfortunately, she has recently left us. But you're right — she was indeed still guiding the Chrysos Heirs forward.

t_ch: 不可思议。那姑娘竟能耐受住时光无情的磨蚀…一直坚持到这个年代。
t_en: Incredible. That girl actually managed to endure the merciless erosion of time... and lasted for so long.

t_ch: 我问你，雅辛忒丝——既然你能认出我的身份，那你应当也读过我的亲笔？
t_en: Answer me, Hyacinthia. Since you recognize me, you must have also read my writings, no?

t_ch: 和我族相关的史料，我全都熟记在心——当然也包括您留下的亲笔。
t_en: Every record regarding my lineage is etched in my memory, including your words.

t_ch: 那么，你应该知道，我曾从某位缇里西庇俄丝那里求得过一则预言。
t_en: In that case, you're probably aware of the prophecy I sought from a certain Tribios.

t_ch: 当然——<color=#dbc291ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
t_en: Yes. <color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>

t_ch: 不过…很遗憾，至今还没有哪位先祖能解读出这道预言的涵义。
t_en: But unfortunately, no ancestor has ever been able to truly decipher its meaning.

t_ch: 原来如此。但缇里西庇俄丝的预言从未落空……
t_en: I see. Yet Tribios' prophecies never fail...

t_ch: 或许你会见证它应验，孩子。希望预言能为你带去温柔的命运。
t_en: Perhaps you'll be the one to witness its fulfillment, child. May the prophecy lead you to a gentle fate.

t_ch: 谢谢您，特克菈大人。无论预言指向了何种结局，我都会迎头赶上——因为只有尽到了最大的努力，我们才能微笑着面对任何结果…您说对吗？
t_en: Thank you, Lady Ektra. Whatever fate the prophecy holds, I'll face it head-on. It's only by giving everything we have that we can truly accept any outcome with a smile... won't you agree?

t_ch: 哈…我喜欢你，孩子。我多希望这场对话能再多延续一阵。
t_en: Hah... I like you, child. I wish this conversation could go on a little longer.

t_ch: 收下我的祝福吧，雅辛忒丝。初见你时，我心中确有担忧……
t_en: Take my blessing, Hyacinthia. When I first saw you, I indeed had my doubts...

t_ch: …但你的信念打动了我。如果天空的神性注定要被取代…我希望它能接过你的乐观和温柔。
t_en: But your resolve has touched me. If Sky's divinity is fated to pass on... I hope it incorporates your optimism and kindness.

t_ch: 您的认可是无价之宝，将军。请安歇吧…我一定会将您的馈赠物尽其用。
t_en: Your blessing is a treasure beyond measure, General. Rest well... I'll make sure your gift is put to its best use.

t_ch: 特克菈将军…和史料中记载的形象反差很大，是一位相当温柔的人呢。
t_en: General Ektra is... so different from how the records described her. She's quite a gentle person.

t_ch: 走吧，该回树庭去了…不能让丹宝和小伊卡担心呀。
t_en: Alright, time to head back to the Grove... I shouldn't keep Dannie and Little Ica waiting.

t_ch: 嘟嘟！嘟！
t_en: Doot-Doot! Doot!

t_ch: 你回来了。这趟还顺利吗？
t_en: You're back. How did it go?

t_ch: 嗯，非常顺利。你的灵水术帮了大忙啦，丹宝。
t_en: It went great. Your spirit water art was a huge help, Dannie.

t_ch: 那位先祖的英魂和你说了什么，介意和我说说吗？
t_en: Do you mind sharing what your ancestor's spirit said to you?

t_ch: 风堇向丹恒复述了她和特克菈将军的对话……
t_en: Hyacine recounts her conversation with General Ektra to Dan Heng...

t_ch: 怎么啦，丹宝？
t_en: What's wrong, Dannie?

t_ch: 没什么，听上去一切都很顺利。只是…我有些在意你提到的那则预言。
t_en: Nothing. It sounds like everything went smoothly. It's just... I'm a bit concerned about the prophecy you mentioned.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>

t_ch: 不知怎么，我好像能从这简短字句中体会到些微的…悲伤。
t_en: I can somehow sense a hint of... sadness in those brief words.

t_ch: 是因为丹宝的性格很容易伤春悲秋吧？缇宁大人每天都要解读许多预言，这也只是其中普普通通的一条而已，不必太在意啦。
t_en: You've always been a bit of a sensitive soul, haven't you, Dannie? Lady Trinnon deciphers countless prophecies every day, and this one's just another among many. Don't worry too much about it.

t_ch: 嗯…我也希望如此。
t_en: ...I hope so.

t_ch: 走吧，丹宝，别愁眉苦脸的啦。求告先祖最后的一站，我们可是要出个远门咯。
t_en: Come on, Dannie. Don't look so gloomy. We're gonna have to take a long trip for the final visit to the ancestors.

t_ch: 我们要去哪？
t_en: Where are we going?

t_ch: 最后一站的目的地，是万敌阁下的故乡——悬锋城。
t_en: Our final stop is Lord Mydei's home — Castrum Kremnos.

t_ch: 就是这里，我们到啦。
t_en: We're here. This is it.

t_ch: 悬锋城……
t_en: Castrum Kremnos...

t_ch: 万敌阁下在这里孤身对抗黑潮，日复一日…我有些担心他的状态。
t_en: Lord Mydei has been fighting the black tide here alone day after day... I'm worried about him.

t_ch: 他此前还以惊雷捎来消息，要我们提防盗火行者的行动。
t_en: He sent a message earlier, carried by thunder, warning us to watch out for the Flame Reaver's actions.

t_ch: 那就说明，他还没有被黑潮的疯狂吞没。
t_en: That means he hasn't been consumed by the black tide's madness yet.

t_ch: 我们来到这里是为了完成重要的使命…最好不要介入他的战场。你说呢，丹宝？
t_en: We're here to complete an important mission... We shouldn't interfere with his battlefield. Don't you agree, Dannie?

t_ch: 同意。
t_en: I agree.

t_ch: 那边——在那里沉睡的英魂，是我的祖母。
t_en: There — that sleeping spirit... is my grandmother.

t_ch: 你的…祖母？
t_en: Your... grandmother?

t_ch: 对。我的祖母雅辛缇娅是一位斗士，她也曾替昏光庭院参加过悬锋祭典。
t_en: Yes. My grandmother Jacyntha was a warrior. She represented the Twilight Courtyard in the Kremnos Festival.

t_ch: 她一路过关斩将走到了悬锋祭典的最后，只差一步就能为天空之子赢得和平誓约。但…她最终还是败于当时的督战勇士之手。
t_en: She fought her way through every challenge and reached the final stage of the Kremnos Festival. She was just one step away from securing a peace treaty for the Skyfolk, but... was ultimately defeated by the champion warrior of that time.

t_ch: 我对祭典上的厮杀细节并没有什么考究， 只在书卷上读到「那是一场光荣的决斗」。
t_en: I've never looked too deeply into the details of such ritualistic violence. The scrolls simply described it as "a glorious duel."

t_ch: 但光荣的决斗背后…是悲壮的落幕。祭典结束不久，祖母的伤情恶化，最终逝于异乡…这座算碑就是悬锋人应她的遗愿留下的最后纪念。
t_en: But behind the glorious duel... was a tragic end. Not long after the festival, my grandmother's injuries worsened, and she passed away far from home. This Prophecy Tablet was left here by the Kremnoans to honor her final wish.

t_ch: 而祖母的去世，也使得战争阴影下本就摇摇欲坠的昏光庭院最终解体。
t_en: Her death marked the final collapse of the Twilight Courtyard, already fragile under the shadow of war.

t_ch: 那位和她展开死斗的悬锋勇士……
t_en: And the Kremnoan warrior she fought against...

t_ch: …是克拉特鲁斯阁下。
t_en: ...was Lord Krateros.

t_ch: 但你还是救下了他的性命，尽管他夺走了你的至亲。
t_en: Yet you still saved his life, even though he took your family.

t_ch: 看到身负重伤的他倒在地上，血流不止…我很难用语言表达那时的复杂心绪。
t_en: Seeing him lying there, gravely wounded, bleeding out... I can't put what I felt at that moment into words.

t_ch: 但当我听说，克拉特鲁斯阁下是为了保护缇安老师才挨下了沉痛的一击，我内心的杂念便消散了。
t_en: But when I heard Lord Krateros took that fatal blow to protect Lady Trianne... All those tangled feelings faded away.

t_ch: 用白厄阁下的话说，他一定是成为了「更好的人」。
t_en: To quote Lord Phainon, Krateros must have done that "to become a better man."

t_ch: 只有足够强大的心灵才能学会宽恕。你并不逊于你的先祖们，风堇。
t_en: It takes true courage to forgive. You're every bit as strong as your ancestors, Hyacine.

t_ch: 嘿…你越来越会聊天啦，丹宝。
t_en: Heh... You're getting better at this, Dannie.

t_ch: 当她发现唤醒自己的竟是她曾宠爱的孙女…不知道祖母会作何反应呢？
t_en: I wonder what she'd think... When the one awaking her turns out to be her beloved granddaughter.

t_ch: …我将和神谕中的英雄们一道重返天空，取回火种。
t_en: ...I will join the heroes of the prophecy to return to the sky and retrieve the Coreflame.

t_ch: 先祖啊，请给予您慷慨的赐福吧……
t_en: Ancestor, please bestow upon me your generous blessing...

t_ch: 仔细聆听风堇与祖母的交谈。
t_en: Listen carefully to Hyacine talk with her grandmother.

t_ch: 从远处见证风堇收集赐福。
t_en: Witness Hyacine collect blessings from afar.

t_ch: 风堇通过彩虹匣召唤出了先祖的英魂……
t_en: Hyacine used the Chroma Coffer to summon the heroic spirit of the ancestor...

t_ch: 一番交谈过后，风堇从祖母雅辛缇娅处获得了第三道天空赐福。
t_en: After a discussion, Hyacine obtained the third sky blessing from her grandmother, Jacyntha.

t_ch: 临别之际，祖母最后一次为风堇讲述了那段关于天空的英雄——「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝的传说……
t_en: At the moment of parting, Grandmother told Hyacine one last time the legend of the hero of the sky — Seliose the Daythunder Knight...

t_ch: 这是…生者的世界？
t_en: Is this... the world of the living?

t_ch: 等等，你，难道是……
t_en: Wait... You... could you be...

t_ch: 祖母——是我，您的雅辛忒丝。
t_en: Grandmother, it's me, your Hyacinthia.

t_ch: 雅辛忒丝，我的小蜂鸟！为何是你…将我唤醒的怎会是你？！
t_en: Hyacinthia, my little hummingbird! Why... how... Why is it you who awakened me???

t_ch: 我从未想过这种情景…我本以为这一天来临时，我会为所有先祖感到释然。但现在……
t_en: I have never imagined this... I thought I would feel happy for all my ancestors when this day came, but now...

t_ch: 现在，我甚至无法尽享这与你重逢的喜悦！
t_en: I can't even experience the joy of seeing you again!

t_ch: 您还记得…在我刚满八周岁时，您和父亲带我参加人生中第一次天空祭礼时的情境吗？
t_en: Do you remember that... you and Father took me to my very first Sky Rite when I was eight?

t_ch: 那时，您让我从四件配饰中选择一件：代表尊贵的烈阳头环，代表力量的雷雨手镯，象征着智慧的冰雪戒指，还有喻义友善的微光吊坠……
t_en: Back then, you wanted me to pick one accessory out of four: The sun crown representing nobility, the storm bracelet symbolizing strength, the ice ring embodying wisdom, and the radiant pendant signifying kindness...

t_ch: 祖母，您还记得我那时的选择吗？
t_en: Grandmother, do you remember the one I chose?

t_ch: 那时…你吟诵着稚嫩的祷词，为那枚不起眼的吊坠引来了一抹微光……
t_en: You spoke an innocent little prayer, infusing a faint thread of light to that modest pendant...

t_ch: 对。而且，您的反应还有些吃惊——因为在过去的几百年间，没有哪个天空一族的孩子跟我做了同样的选择。
t_en: Yes, and I remember how surprised you were. In all those centuries, no other child of the Sky people had ever made the same choice I did.

t_ch: 雅辛忒丝…我一度以为你是个怯懦的孩子。
t_en: Hyacinthia... There was a time when I thought you were a timid child.

t_ch: 你对兵戈武技兴致寥寥，性格中也全然不见我们一族中的刚强跟硬朗。
t_en: You never had much interest in swords or battle, and had no relation to that fiery determination and strength in our blood.

t_ch: 但我始终告诉自己：那没什么不好。如果我的小蜂鸟能在乐观和善意中度过一生，那绝非她的不幸。
t_en: Yet I've told myself — that's not a bad thing. If my hummingbird could live her life in kindness and optimism, then it'd be a good thing.

t_ch: 我未曾想过，取回艾格勒火种的重担果真会落在你的身上……
t_en: I never thought the burden of retrieving the Coreflame of Aquila would fall to you...

t_ch: 请别替我担心，祖母。在我看来，定义天空之子血脉的不只是杰出的力量，还有我们捏塑世界的天赋。
t_en: Don't worry about me, Grandmother. I believe what makes someone a Skyfolk isn't just outstanding strength, but the capacity to shape the world.

t_ch: 千年前，当世界急需一位敢于挑战神明的英雄时，英雄塞涅俄丝站了出来，开启了逐火的时代……
t_en: When the world cried out for a hero to challenge the gods a thousand years ago, Seliose stepped forward and began the Flame-Chasing era...

t_ch: …而在逐火之旅即将步入尾声的这一刻，眼前满目疮痍的世界正急切地呼求着疗愈。
t_en: ...And now, as the Flame-Chase Journey nears its end, this broken world is crying out for something else — healing.

t_ch: 这是多么美妙的巧合呀——千年的英雄史诗，以「天空」作为开篇，亦由「天空」写下结语……
t_en: Isn't it poetic? A saga that spans a thousand years began with Sky, and will also end with Sky...

t_ch: 呵…你还是那么乐观啊，和小时候一模一样。
t_en: Heh... you're still as optimistic as ever, just like when you were a kid.

t_ch: 既然你已经下定决心，那就将你的信念贯彻到底吧，雅辛忒丝。
t_en: If your mind is set, Hyacinthia, then carry your resolve through to the very end.

t_ch: 带着我的赐福回归天空，俯瞰这个行将接受拯救的世界吧。
t_en: Return to the sky with my blessing, and watch over this world on the threshold of salvation.

t_ch: 祖母…谢谢您。但我还剩最后一个请求。
t_en: Grandmother... thank you, but I have one last request.

t_ch: 说吧，雅辛忒丝。我们应该还有时间。
t_en: Speak, Hyacinthia. We should still have some time.

t_ch: 在您离开以前，可否请您像当年那样…再为我讲述一次天空英雄的传说？
t_en: Before you go... could you tell me the tale of the sky hero once more, just like you used to?
Hehe...

t_ch: 那你一定要仔细聆听，我最亲爱的小蜂鸟。毕竟，这就是最后一次了……
t_en: Then, listen closely, my dearest hummingbird. After all, this will be the last time...

t_ch: 祖母在最后的日记中说，她希望当使命召唤之时，天空一族的后人能将启程的消息带给她留在世间的魂灵。
t_en: In her final diary entry, my grandmother wrote that when the moment of destiny comes, a descendant of the Sky people would deliver the message of their departure to her spirit.

t_ch: 泰坦征伐千载，世界满目疮痍。
t_en: For millennia, the Titans waged relentless wars, leaving the world scarred and ravaged.

t_ch: 黄金战争百年，诸邦混乱衰疲。
t_en: A century of the Chrysos War plunged the nations into chaos and decay.

t_ch: 直到，一支奔腾着凡人之怒的长枪……
t_en: Until a spear, fueled by mortal rage...

t_ch: 刺破那掩埋了救世神谕的烟尘与战火。
t_en: Pierced through the smoke and flames that buried the prophecy of deliverance.

t_ch: 捏塑天象的艾格勒，手握惊雷、额戴赫日的百目神鸟……
t_en: Aquila, the celestial shaper, the hundred-eyed divine bird crowned with the blazing sun and wielding thunder...

t_ch: 虽为尼卡多利戳盲九十九目，仍独留一只眼睛，怒视那领受它赐福、却举戈相向的晨昏后嗣。
t_en: Though struck blind in ninety-nine eyes by Nikador, they kept one eye, glaring at the children of twilight who received divine blessing yet turned their weapons against the gods.

t_ch: 天空的黄金裔，<color=#dbc291ff>「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝</color>，在黄昏时分，身披羽翼、登临晨昏之眼的禁土。
t_en: The Chrysos Heir of the Sky, <color=#dbc291ff>Seliose the Daythunder Knight</color>, ascended the forbidden lands of the Eye of Twilight at dusk, clad in wings.

t_ch: 她的左侧是狮首的「烈阳之翼」索拉比斯，咆哮中吐纳灼世的神火；
t_en: To her left was the lion-headed Solabis, the Sunlit Wings, whose roars breathed divine flames and scorched the world.

t_ch: 她的右侧是马身的「星月之翎」露奈比斯，旋步中踢踏漫天的星罗。
t_en: To her right was the horse-bodied Lunabis, the Moonlit Plume, whose graceful steps trampled the stars in the heavens.

t_ch: 一人两兽，向天空的主宰发起挑战，誓将弑夺神明的火种。
t_en: The one warrior and her two beasts challenged the ruler of the sky, determined to seize the divine Coreflame through plunder.

t_ch: 泰坦的每声怒吼都横生落雷，泰坦的每次倾身都卷起飓风。
t_en: The Titan's every roar summoned lightning bolts, and their every movement stirred cyclones.

t_ch: 泰坦受伤的血液…在世间坠下沸腾的血雨，汇成滚烫的洪流。
t_en: The wounded Titan's blood... poured down like boiling rain upon the world and converged into scalding torrents.

t_ch: 战斗的最后，「烈阳之翼」点燃了泰坦的羽翼，「星月之翎」封锁了泰坦的神躯……
t_en: In the final moments of the battle, the Sunlit Wings set the Titan's wings aflame, while the Moonlit Plume sealed the divine body...

t_ch: 那翅翼折断、伤痕累累的天空英雄，艰难抬起长枪…将那最后一只恫世的巨眼穿透。
t_en: The battered hero of the sky, with her wings broken and her body covered in wounds, struggled to lift her spear... and pierced the last monstrous eye.

t_ch: 泰坦的神躯轰然倒下…与此同时，苍穹撕挦如同裂帛，天空即将与神明一同陨落。
t_en: The Titan's divine body crashed to the ground, and with it, the sky tore apart like fabric, about to fall with its god.

t_ch: 凡人的惊惶与祈求，令天空英雄再度起身。
t_en: The fear and pleas of mortals urged the hero of the sky to rise again.

t_ch: 「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝，世上首度弑神的黄金裔，与两位骁勇的翼兽伙伴，径直冲入艾格勒逐渐溃散的躯干。
t_en: Seliose the Daythunder Knight, the first of the Chrysos Heirs to slay a god in this world, charged into the crumbling body of Aquila with her two fearless winged companions.

t_ch: 她与泰坦融为一体，再度撑起天穹，只为世间留下一句激昂的寄语——
t_en: She merged with the Titan, holding up the sky once more, only to leave behind a powerful message for the world —

t_ch: 「我的后裔终将领受祝福，脚踏虹桥重登天空…在那创世神谕的终点，从我手中带回这枚火种。」
t_en: "My descendants will be blessed and cross the rainbow bridge back to the sky... At the end of the Prophecy of Genesis, they will reclaim the Coreflame from my hands."

t_ch: 数日以后，黎明云崖……
t_en: A few days later, at Dawncloud...

t_ch: （就在今天了……）
t_en: (Today's the day...)

t_ch: 哇，没想到这么高的地方，居然会这么热闹……
t_en: Wow, I didn't expect it to be so lively up here...

t_ch: 这里的人们，是来为黄金裔们送行的吗？
t_en: Are these people here to send off the Chrysos Heirs?

t_ch: 白厄在那儿——去找他聊聊吧。
t_en: There's Phainon. Let's go talk to him.

t_ch: …我知道这个要求非常出格，尼莫西妮——希望你能理解。
t_en: ...I know this is a big ask, Mnemosyne — I hope you understand.

t_ch: 请别这么说，白厄阁下。能成为你托付的对象，我们倍感荣幸。
t_en: Please, don't say that, Lord Phainon. It's an honor to for us to be entrusted with this task.

t_ch: 去吧。但愿我们的担忧不会变成现实。
t_en: Go, then. Let's hope our concerns don't come true.

t_ch: 愿你们都能平安归来，阁下。
t_en: I hope you all return safely, my lord.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你来了。
t_en: Ah, there you are, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 这次没再睡懒觉了？
t_en: You didn't oversleep this time, did you?

t_ch: 被粉色小狗给吵醒了。
t_en: A pink puppy woke me up.

t_ch: …你真的很喜欢这个称呼呢。算了，接受了这个设定后，人家内心已经毫无波澜啦！
t_en: ...You like calling me that, don't you? Well, I've embraced it now. It doesn't even faze me anymore!

t_ch: 遇上大事我从不迟到。
t_en: I never show up late for important things.

t_ch: 哈哈哈…真是靠谱。但愿你没有牺牲睡眠时间，接下来可还有一场硬仗啊。
t_en: Hahaha... always dependable. I just hope you didn't lose any sleep. We've still got a tough fight ahead.

t_ch: 那我再回去睡会儿。
t_en: Well, maybe I'll go back and grab a quick nap.

t_ch: 既来之，则安之。趁着人还没到齐，你可以在这里打个盹。
t_en: Since you're here, make yourself comfortable. You can take a nap while we're waiting for everyone else.

t_ch: 你做好准备了吗，战友？不出意外…这就是我们并肩作战的最后一役了。
t_en: Ready, comrade? If all goes according to plan... this could be the last battle where we fight at each other's side.

t_ch: 假如翁法罗斯与天外的隔绝的确是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}降下的诅咒，那今天过后，你们就能重返家园了。
t_en: If the curse separating Amphoreus from the world beyond the sky is truly {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s doing, then you'll be able to return home after their fall.

t_ch: 地上一天，天上十年……
t_en: A day on the ground feels like ten years in the sky...

t_ch: 当真吗？这我可是第一次听说……
t_en: Really? That's the first time I've heard that...

t_ch: {F#她}{M#他}随便说说的，你别这么轻易就信啦。
t_en: {M#He}{F#She} just makes things up. Don't take it too seriously.

t_ch: 前提是能修好车厢。
t_en: That's assuming we can fix the car.

t_ch: 啊…抱歉，这我就爱莫能助了。
t_en: Ah... sorry, I'm no help there.

t_ch: 别担心啦。丹恒和我们说过，那位来古士议员能帮上{NICKNAME}的忙。
t_en: Don't worry. Dan Heng mentioned that Councillor Lygus can help {NICKNAME} with that.

t_ch: （敷衍）我可真舍不得你们啊！
t_en: *Insincerely* I'll miss you all!

t_ch: …语气有些敷衍啊，伙计。
t_en: ...You sound a little insincere there, buddy.

t_ch: …真的好敷衍呀，搭档！
t_en: ...That was totally insincere, partner!

t_ch: 我不是还要转生为泰坦吗？
t_en: Aren't I supposed to be reincarnating as a Titan?

t_ch: 那可就麻烦了啊…说什么都得在「再创世」之前把你们送回家去。
t_en: That would be a problem... We'll need to get you home before Era Nova.

t_ch: 煽情的告别就留给未来吧，正好先在心底酝酿一下情绪。何况之前在浴场玩豹豹…碰碰……
t_en: Let's leave the emotional goodbyes for later. That'll give us some time to figure out what we should be feeling at that time. Besides, when we were playing Seal... Slammers...

t_ch: …咳，海豹冲撞游戏的时候，你不是教过我一句话吗？
t_en: ...Ahem, that bumping seal game. Didn't you teach me something back then?

t_ch: 「半场开香槟，等着被翻盘吧！」
t_en: "Crack the champagne at halftime to watch victory slip away!"

t_ch: 现在是<unbreak>10</unbreak>/<unbreak>12</unbreak>场，可以开。
t_en: Well, it's <unbreak>10</unbreak>/<unbreak>12</unbreak>th time now. We can totally open the champagne.

t_ch: 那我就得还你另外一句话了，丹恒教给我的——「行百里者半九十」。
t_en: Well, then I have to use something else Dan Heng taught me as come back — "The last mile is the hardest."

t_ch: 会赢的，老白。
t_en: We'll win, dear fellow.

t_ch: 「行百里者半九十」——这句是丹恒教我的。道理差不多，就是…更文绉绉一些。
t_en: "The last mile is the hardest." — That's from Dan Heng. Same principle, just... more elegantly put.

t_ch: 咦，说到丹恒…他人在哪里呢？
t_en: Hey, speaking of Dan Heng... where is he?

t_ch: 他到得最早，已经提前登上崖顶等我们了。我猜，他是不太习惯被这么多双眼睛盯着——
t_en: He arrived before everyone else and climbed to the cliff top to wait for us. He's probably not keen on being the center of attention...

t_ch: 白厄大人，请你们一定要平安归来！
t_en: Lord Phainon, please make sure you all come back safely!

t_ch: 请打倒冷漠的{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}晨昏之眼{RUBY_E#}，还翁法罗斯一片仁爱的天空吧。
t_en: Please defeat the indifferent {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#}, and restore a compassionate sky to Amphoreus.

t_ch: 谢谢诸位的祝福！请放心，我们已经做好了万全的准备。
t_en: Thank you all for your blessings! Rest assured. We're fully prepared.

t_ch: 不过，今天的主角并不是我。一会儿，等风堇小姐到场的时候——请诸位也不要吝惜自己的鼓舞。
t_en: But I'm not the main attraction today. Please don't hesitate to cheer for Miss Hyacine when she arrives.

t_ch: 风堇小姐，被选中的天空之女…昏光庭院的骄傲！
t_en: Miss Hyacine, the chosen daughter of the Sky... the pride of the Twilight Courtyard!

t_ch: 她也是奥赫玛，乃至整个翁法罗斯的骄傲。另外……
t_en: She's not just the pride of Okhema, but all of Amphoreus as well. And furthermore...

t_ch: 逐火之旅尽管是由黄金裔主持的，但为它做出贡献的绝不只被阿格莱雅选中之人。
t_en: While the Flame-Chase Journey is led by the Chrysos Heirs, it's not just those chosen by Aglaea who contributed to it.

t_ch: 也请将感激献给两位来自异邦的勇者吧——为了素不相识的你我，他们甘愿挺身而出，赴汤蹈火！
t_en: Let's extend our gratitude to the two warriors of the outlands — who bravely stepped up and risked their lives for those they've never met!

t_ch: 英雄{NICKNAME}！您的故事会被写入史诗，在新世界被众人传唱。
t_en: Hero {NICKNAME}, your saga will be chronicled in epics and celebrated across the new world!

t_ch: 身负欧洛尼斯之力的异邦勇士，救世的先驱！
t_en: Warrior from the outlands! Endowed with the might of Oronyx! The vanguard of deliverance!

t_ch: 挺会来事的嘛。
t_en: Quite the flatterer, aren't you?

t_ch: 这场面，你已经能应对自如了。
t_en: Looks like you've mastered public speaking now.

t_ch: 哈…我们认识也有段时间了，你应该能分出我什么时候在客套，什么时候又是在说真心话。
t_en: Ha... After all this time, you should know when I'm just being polite and when I'm genuinely speaking from the heart.

t_ch: 刚才那句话就是我发自内心的赞许，{NICKNAME}。要是那时我没有听从自己的直觉，信任你和丹恒，奥赫玛现在不知道会变成什么模样……
t_en: That praise was heartfelt, {NICKNAME}. Had I not trusted my instincts and put my faith in you and Dan Heng, it's hard to imagine what might have become of Okh-

t_ch: …啊，今天的主角来了。
t_en: ...Ah, the guest of honor has arrived.

t_ch: 奥赫玛的各位——我已经得到了天空一族先祖的赐福。
t_en: People of Okhema, I've been blessed by the ancestors of the Sky people.

t_ch: 他们愿意将跨越千年的使命相托，由我去取回{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种。
t_en: They have agreed to bestow the thousand-year mission to me and to have me claim the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 现在是光历<unbreak>4932</unbreak>年，英雄塞涅俄丝开启逐火之旅后的第<unbreak>1062</unbreak>个年头。
t_en: Today is the year <unbreak>4932</unbreak> of the Light Calendar, <unbreak>1062</unbreak> years since the hero Seliose initiated the Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 我，天空一族的雅辛忒丝，准备好引领人子重登天空了。
t_en: I, Hyacinthia of the Sky people, am prepared to lead the children of humanity back to the sky.

t_ch: 历史从不会均匀地呼吸。它时而屏息千年，宛若时光停滞；时而急促地喘息，仿佛要在一瞬之间倾覆世界和文明。
t_en: History doesn't breathe evenly. At times, it suspends its breath for millennia as though time has frozen. At other times, it pants rapidly, as if poised to topple the world and our civilization in an instant.

t_ch: 它急促的呼吸掀起了风暴，将你我都卷入了其中。风堇，你作为旁观者见证了四枚火种的回归……
t_en: Its hurried gasps have sparked a tempest, sweeping all of us along. Hyacine, as an observer, you've witnessed the return of four Coreflames...

t_ch: 现在，该轮到你履行使命了。这一次，请以亲历者的身份带领我们深入风眼。
t_en: And now it's your turn to fulfill your duty. Please, guide us into the heart of the storm as the executioner of this mission.

t_ch: 久等了，丹恒。
t_en: Thanks for waiting, Dan Heng.

t_ch: 讨伐{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的队伍——现在终于到齐了。
t_en: The team tasked with conquering {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} has finally assembled.

t_ch: 一次又一次，我们在用双手改写一个世界的历史。
t_en: We've reshaped the history of the world with our hands over and over.

t_ch: 我想，这次「开拓」的经历…应该足以令阿基维利称羡。
t_en: I bet this trailblazing expedition... could even make Akivili jealous.

t_ch: 打完这一仗，我们就回家！
t_en: We'll go home as soon as this battle finishes!

t_ch: 精彩的冒险，三月都馋哭了！
t_en: Such an exciting adventure! March's gonna be crying with jealousy!

t_ch: 这次「开拓」，即将圆满收尾！
t_en: This trailblazing expedition is about to end perfectly!

t_ch: 精神很充沛啊，战友。看来我挑的日子还不错。
t_en: So full of energy, comrades. Seems I chose the perfect day.

t_ch: 风堇，接下来就交给你了。
t_en: Hyacine, it's all yours now.

t_ch: 传说，曾经的天空之子分为许多部族。
t_en: Legend tells of the Skyfolk once divided into many tribes.

t_ch: 信奉烈阳的「晖之民」，崇拜雷雨的「雨之民」，以雪为兆的「冬之民」……
t_en: The Sunfolk worshiped the sun, the Rainfolk were devoted to storms, and the Winterfolk waited for signs in the snow...

t_ch: 祖先们生活在艾格勒的光芒照拂之下，眼中却只容得下一种颜色。
t_en: Our ancestors lived under Aquila's light, yet they were blinded to all but one color.

t_ch: 可是他们却忘了——那照拂世间的微光…正是由多种色彩和谐构成。
t_en: They forgot that... the light that illuminates the world is made of countless different colors.

t_ch: 所以，彩虹是我最钟爱的气象——它不仅折射出许多色彩，还含有桥梁的寓意。
t_en: That's why the rainbow is my favorite, for not only does it reflect the many colors, it is also a bridge.

t_ch: 我想以彩虹桥连接人们的心灵…为世间所有灵魂传递希望。
t_en: And I want to use the rainbow bridge to link everyone's hearts... and give hope to every soul on earth.

t_ch: 先祖们啊——
t_en: Ancestors!

t_ch: 请以彩虹作为指引，带我回到天空之子阔别千年的家园吧。
t_en: With the rainbow as your guide, lead me back to the home of the Skyfolk, a land we have not seen for a thousand years!

t_ch: 彩虹匣在震动……
t_en: The Chroma Coffer is vibrating...

t_ch: 这附近一定有先祖的记忆。
t_en: There must be memories of an ancestor nearby.

t_ch: 风堇姐姐！愿迈德漠斯捍卫你！
t_en: Miss Hyacine! May Mydeimos protect you!

t_ch: 希望黄金裔们能够凯旋…为昏淡的世界带来曙光。
t_en: I hope the Chrysos Heirs triumph... and bring light to this darkening world.

t_ch: 他们一定能摘得「天空」的火种…为逐火之旅写下圆满的终章！
t_en: They'll surely seize the Coreflame of Sky... and bring the Flame-Chase Journey to its perfect conclusion!

t_ch: 乘着彩虹桥飞行，真是种奇妙的体验。
t_en: Flying along the Rainbow Bridge is truly an amazing experience.

t_ch: 晨昏之眼……
t_en: The Eye of Twilight...

t_ch: 传说中{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的天空堡垒——没想到有朝一日我竟能亲自踏足。
t_en: It's the legendary sky fortress of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} — I never imagined that one day I'd be able to step foot on it.

t_ch: 先祖们曾在天上建立了宏伟的文明，而我们脚下的「晨昏之眼」就是艾格勒的栖地，云间城邦的核心。
t_en: My ancestors once built a magnificent civilization among the heavens. The Eye of Twilight, which we are standing on, is the home of Aquila and the heart of the city-state in the clouds.

t_ch: 想必英雄塞涅俄丝就是站在这里向艾格勒宣战，<color=#dbc291ff>翻开了人类逐火征程的第一页……</color>
t_en: This must be where the hero Seliose stood when she challenged Aquila and <color=#dbc291ff>began the first step of the Flame-Chase Journey...</color>

t_ch: 我们来到这里，就是为了给由她亲手开启的征程画上句号。
t_en: We are here to end the journey she began.

t_ch: 你相信传说吗？
t_en: Do you believe in legends?

t_ch: 一切事物都会随时间流逝磨损，传说也是如此。但无论它是真是假，我们要做的事不会变。
t_en: Even legends are corroded by time, but that won't change what we must do.

t_ch: 轮到我们挑战泰坦了。
t_en: It's our turn to challenge the Titan.

t_ch: 对。无论传说的记载有几分真实…我们要做的事不会变。
t_en: Yes... What we must do will not change, no matter how much of the legends are true.

t_ch: 根据史料记载：信仰艾格勒的文明掌握着先进的科技。加上地理位置占优，天空之城是黄金战争中唯一能与悬锋城正面对抗的势力。
t_en: According to historical records, the civilization that worshiped Aquila once mastered advanced technology, which made their strategically located Sky Castrum the only force that could face Castrum Kremnos head-on in the Chrysos War.

t_ch: 但它内部并不团结。尤其是在神谕降世后…黄金裔掀起的频繁内战令他们实力大减，最终只能藏匿于云中，远离地上的战火。
t_en: But they were divided within. The frequent wars started by the Chrysos Heirs drained their power, especially after the prophecy descended. In the end, they had to hide among the clouds, far from the conflicts raging below.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>据说，是两支最主要的天空部落，晖之民和雨之民之间产生了分歧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Apparently, the division was between the two most important sky tribes, the Sunfolk and the Rainfolk.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>正因无法忍受同胞间无休止的纷争，塞涅俄丝才会把枪尖对准高高在上的泰坦。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And Seliose's frustration towards the endless strife among her people made her turn her spear towards the Titan above.</color>

t_ch: 她最后去哪儿了？
t_en: Where did she go in the end?

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝的英勇超乎常人想象，她率领两头翼兽伙伴将愤怒的泰坦逼入绝境，一同消失在了天空的尽头。
t_en: After driving the enraged Titan to the brink of defeat with her two winged companions, they all vanished somewhere in the sky. Her courage was unparalleled.

t_ch: 她战力值这么高？
t_en: Was her ATK really that high?

t_ch: 她率领两头翼兽伙伴将愤怒的泰坦逼入绝境，一同消失在了天空的尽头。哪怕传说有夸大其词的成分，塞涅俄丝的战绩也十分惊人。
t_en: After driving the enraged Titan to the brink of defeat with her two winged companions, they all vanished somewhere in the sky. Her achievements were unparalleled, even if later legends exaggerated the details.

t_ch: 但她没能终结艾格勒，归还「天空」的火种。有人说，她以自身封印了神明的怒火，将它囚禁在晨昏之眼深处，永世支撑翁法罗斯的苍穹。
t_en: Yet she still could not end Aquila nor bring back the Coreflame of Sky. Some say she sealed the wrath of the god within herself, trapping them deep within the Eye of Twilight to support the heavens of Amphoreus forever.

t_ch: 换言之，她和泰坦融为了一体…换做以前，我会把它当作天方夜谭。但有了那刻夏老师的先例，也不足为奇了。
t_en: In other words, she became one with the Titan... I would have considered it a fairytale, but after seeing what happened with Professor Anaxa? Not anymore.

t_ch: 历经千年的时光，那位泰坦，和与它共生的英雄…一直在这里俯瞰着大地么？
t_en: Has that Titan... and that fused hero... been looking down on the world from here for a thousand years?

t_ch: 不对劲……
t_en: Something's not right...

t_ch: 我能隐约感受到此处的空旷和浩大，但眼下只有一片漆黑。
t_en: I can kind of feel how big and empty this place is, but all I see is darkness.

t_ch: 那团黑暗的背后藏着什么…？
t_en: What's on the other side of this?

t_ch: 也许…是<color=#dbc291ff>「天象画壁」</color>。
t_en: Maybe... it's the <color=#dbc291ff>celestial mural</color>.

t_ch: 在天空城邦的习俗中，它连接着翁法罗斯的天幕，天象画壁呈现出的气候，将会转映为现实中的天气。
t_en: The Sky city believes that mural to be connected to Amphoreus's sky, and any weather condition depicted on it will become actual weather.

t_ch: 晴空，阴霾，冰雪，雷暴…画壁会映射出艾格勒变幻莫测的情绪。在和平年代，天空祭司们会集结于此，祈求神明以和煦的暖风吹拂世间，带来丰收。
t_en: The mural would reflect Aquila's shifting mood, like clear skies, fog, snow, or thunderstorms... The Sky Priests would gather here during peaceful times and pray to the god for warm breezes and good harvests.

t_ch: 如果要用灰宝和丹宝熟悉的词语来形容——把它当作一块巨大的「屏幕」就行啦。
t_en: To put it in words that Grayie and Dannie would understand... just think of it as a massive screen.

t_ch: 分辨率多少合适？
t_en: What's the appropriate resolution?

t_ch: 懂了，艾格勒影视乐园。
t_en: Got it. Aquila's theme park.

t_ch: 无论如何，在黑暗中探索一定不是上策。如果能将画壁点亮…它或许能为我们提供前行必要的光源。
t_en: In any case, exploring in the dark is never a good option. If we could light up the mural... it might just provide us with the light needed to move forward.

t_ch: 那座显眼的装置，恐怕就是举办仪式用的？去看看吧——环境很黑，请当心脚下。
t_en: That really conspicuous device might be part of the ritual? Let's go take a look. It's dark, so watch your feet.

t_ch: 如何，有头绪吗？
t_en: How about it? Got any leads?

t_ch: 完全不知道该怎么启动，如果有前人的智慧帮忙就好了……
t_en: I have no idea how to turn it on. If only we had help from the wisdom of those who came before us...

t_ch: 对呀！差点忘了——灰宝，迷宝，能借用两位的力量吗？
t_en: That's it! I almost forgot — Grayie, Memmie, can I borrow your powers?

t_ch: 交给岁月的半神吧。
t_en: Leave it to the demigod of time.

t_ch: 拜托你了，迷迷。
t_en: Counting on you, Mem.

t_ch: 明白！只要找到散落在附近的记忆就行了，对吧？简单，给人家一点时间……
t_en: Got it! We just need to find the scattered memory nearby, right? That's simple. Give me a little time...

t_ch: 感受时间的流向……
t_en: Feel the flow of time...

t_ch: 那边……
t_en: Over there...

t_ch: 还有那边！
t_en: And over there!

t_ch: 搞定！这里人烟稀少，岁月的痕迹清晰可见呢。
t_en: Done! There haven't been many people for a while, so the traces of time are super obvious.

t_ch: 不愧是迷宝，帮大忙啦。
t_en: I knew you could do it, Memmie! You are a huge help.

t_ch: 还不知道如何启动这个装置，先去聆听先祖们的对话吧。
t_en: We still don't know how to turn on this device. Let's hear what the ancestors have to say first.

t_ch: 呵…愚昧的雨之民啊……
t_en: Heh... Foolish Rainfolk...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>伟大的艾格勒已在金色的云朵间留下了它的化身印记……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The great Aquila has already left a mark of their manifestation among the golden clouds...</color>

t_ch: 神的选择已经明朗，只有我等烈阳之子才是天空的正统…这场战争，注定将以晖之民的胜利作结……
t_en: The god's choice is clear: Only we, the Sunborn, are the true heirs of the sky... This war is destined to end in the victory of the Sunfolk...

t_ch: 愿「晨昏之眼」永不闭合，永昼笼罩大地……
t_en: May the Eye of Twilight never close. May eternal daylight embrace the land...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「在金色的云朵间留下了印记……」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Left a mark among the golden clouds..."</color>

t_ch: 这说的是天象画壁吗？不过，现在什么都看不到……
t_en: Is this referring to the celestial mural? But we can't see anything right now...

t_ch: 傲慢的晖之民，泰坦会贬斥你们的骄狂不恭……
t_en: Arrogant Sunfolk, the Titan will condemn your brazen disrespect...

t_ch: 但塑造天空的艾格勒啊…<color=#dbc291ff>你为何要回避乌云的追赶？</color>难道晴空和阴雨，不是你平等的造物吗？
t_en: But Aquila, you that shaped the sky... <color=#dbc291ff>Why do you avoid the pursuit of dark clouds?</color> Are not clear skies and stormy rains equally your creations?

t_ch: 烈阳的子民将你的行为视作对他们的偏袒，并以此为由挤压我族……
t_en: The Sunborn see your behavior as an act of favoritism towards them, and weaponize this reason to oppress my people...

t_ch: 雨之民不会纵容压迫…神明啊，你若沉默不语，那我们就不得不自行锻铸武器，反抗他们为辉光所掩的恶意……
t_en: The Rainfolk will not suffer in silence... O god, if you remain silent, we shall have to forge our own weapons and resist the malice concealed under your brilliance...

t_ch: 愿「晨昏之眼」永不睁开，霖雨永不止坠……
t_en: May the Eye of Twilight never open, and may torrential rains descend forever...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「回避乌云的追赶？」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Avoid the pursuit of dark clouds?"</color>

t_ch: 艾格勒不喜欢阴雨吗…总觉得不可思议，但先把这条线索记下了吧。
t_en: Aquila doesn't like rainstorms...? It seems a little hard to believe, but we should write this clue down first.

t_ch: 果真和传闻一样，天空之城内部并不团结。
t_en: It is as the rumors said — the Sky Castrum was far from united.

t_ch: 我的猜测没错，这里的确是进行天象仪式的场所。迷宝，还能捞起更多记忆吗？
t_en: My guess was right. This venue is indeed where celestial rituals were performed. Memmie, can you retrieve even more memories?

t_ch: 难不倒人家，给我变——
t_en: No problem at all. Here goes...

t_ch: ——出现了！
t_en: ...There we are!

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「风，雪，雨，曦……」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Wind, snow, rain, shine..."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「以天空百目之名，吾为世间降下天象。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"In the name of the Sky's Hundred Eyes, I bring celestial phenomena upon the world."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「苏醒吧，『天象画壁』……」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Awaken, Celestial Mural..."</color>

t_ch: 停下，愚蠢的阴云之子！
t_en: Stop, foolish Cloudborn!

t_ch: 你们胆敢私自操弄「浑象仪」，篡改天象？这是渎神！
t_en: How dare you tamper with the celestial globe and distort the weather? This is blasphemy!

t_ch: …泰坦将浑象仪赠予先祖，是为了让我们公平地划分阴晴昼夜，好让万物能在各自钟爱的天象下生长。
t_en: ...The Titan bequeathed the celestial globe to our ancestors, so that we could divide the light and dark equally between day and night, so that all things could grow beneath the celestial phenomenon they preferred.

t_ch: 但烈阳之子擅自霸占天象画壁，令白昼无尽漫长，大地受尽干旱与暴晒…你们有何颜面指责被欺压至极的雨之民？！
t_en: But the Sunborn have asserted control over the celestial mural, and now the days are endless, subjecting the land to drought and burning... And you have the gall to accuse the Rainfolk, who you've oppressed!?

t_ch: 大地？大地是我们的夙敌！
t_en: The land? It is our eternal nemesis!

t_ch: 不受艾格勒垂爱的乌云阴雨，要如何带领天空之民赢得黄金战争？
t_en: How can storm clouds and rain, unloved by Aquila, lead the Skyfolk to victory in the Chrysos War?

t_ch: 你们的品格同信仰一般脆弱…去找一个不受烈日眷顾的角落，躲在阴影里孤自落泪吧——你们唯一能做到的事，就是暗自哭泣！
t_en: Your character is as weak as your faith... Go seek out a corner untouched by the sun, and weep solitary tears in the shadows. That's all you lot know how to do anyway — cry in silence!

t_ch: 呵…那就让你看看吧，我们能做到的事……
t_en: Hmph... Then let us show you what we are really made of...

t_ch: 你…你到底……
t_en: You... What are you...

t_ch: 你想做什么…？！
t_en: What are you trying to do?

t_ch: 被热浪冲昏头脑的狂信徒……
t_en: Fanatics whose minds have been muddled by the heat...

t_ch: 艾格勒在上，去死吧！
t_en: By Aquila above, meet your demise!

t_ch: …呃啊啊啊！！
t_en: ...Uwoahhhhhhh!!!

t_ch: 嗯…啊…好吓人的记忆……
t_en: Ugh... Ah... What a terrifying memory...

t_ch: 残酷的内乱，令人唏嘘…看来天空城邦并非败于外敌。
t_en: The brutal internal strife is sad to see... It appears the Sky cities didn't fall to external threats after all.

t_ch: 骄傲的晖之民将自己视作神选，长期压迫其他部族…而受到迫害的雨之民开始埋怨神明，并暗中谋划反击。
t_en: The proud Sunfolk saw themselves as divinely chosen, exacting long-standing oppression on other tribes... And the Rainfolk suffering beneath them began resenting the divine, and plotted their retaliation.

t_ch: 到哪都会发生类似的事…
t_en: A common story everywhere...

t_ch: 神明设立舞台，凡人演出戏剧。类似的戏码，「开拓」已不是第一次见证。
t_en: The divine set the stage, and the mortals perform the play. This isn't the first time we've witnessed such a scene while trailblazing.

t_ch: 真是民智未开啊。
t_en: People are truly ignorant.

t_ch: 生活在肉眼可见的神明庇佑下，发生这种事也不足为奇。
t_en: Not surprising when living in a world with literal gods that you can see.

t_ch: 这个锅确实该泰坦背。
t_en: This blame lies squarely on the Titan's shoulders.

t_ch: 既能使人安心，也能驱人疯狂，这就是信仰的两面。
t_en: Faith is a double-edged sword, capable of calming hearts and corrupting them.

t_ch: 无论身处什么时代，人与人的争端注定难以消解。见识了凯妮斯和「清洗者」的作为…也不难理解这段历史了。
t_en: No matter the era, conflict among humans is destined to persist. Having witnessed the actions of Caenis and the "Cleaners"... it isn't so hard to understand this piece of history.

t_ch: 好奇哪边赢了。
t_en: I'm curious which side won.

t_ch: …这里一片空寂，恐怕没有赢家。
t_en: ...There's nothing but empty silence here. I fear there were no winners.

t_ch: 反抗的一方没什么不对。
t_en: The resistance did nothing wrong.

t_ch: 对错我难以评论，可魔盒一旦被打开，没有人能幸免于难。
t_en: I can't judge who was right or wrong, but when the box of misfortune is opened, no one escapes unscathed.

t_ch: 英雄塞涅俄丝…她又是如何看待晖之民和雨之民的世仇的？传说将笔墨聚焦在她征伐神明的事迹上，却对天空子民的下落含混不清。
t_en: The hero Seliose... How did she view the ancient feud between the Sunfolk and Rainfolk? The legends focus on her god-slaying expedition, but are hazy on the fall of the Sky denizens.

t_ch: 也许，我能在这里拼凑出历史的原貌。
t_en: Perhaps I can piece together the true face of history here.

t_ch: 一步一步来。还记得那位雨之民的吟唱么，风堇？或许那就是开启天象画壁的密钥。
t_en: One step at a time. Do you remember the verse that Rainfolk sang, Hyacine? Perhaps that's the key to unlocking the celestial mural.

t_ch: 嗯，我已经记住啦。现在…我们试着唤醒它吧？
t_en: Yes, I already memorized it. Now... Shall we try to wake it up?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「风，雪，雨，曦……」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Wind, snow, rain, shine..."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「以天空百目之名，吾为世间降下天象。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"In the name of the Sky's Hundred Eyes, I bring celestial phenomena upon the world."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「苏醒吧，『天象画壁』！」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Awaken, Celestial Mural!"</color>

t_ch: 金色的云层，炽烈的辉光……
t_en: Golden clouds, blazing radiance...

t_ch: …真是壮丽的景象啊。
t_en: ...What a breathtaking scene.

t_ch: 看，残像提到的<color=#dbc291ff>「化身印记」</color>——
t_en: Look, the <color=#dbc291ff>"mark of their manifestation"</color> mentioned by the memory fragment...

t_ch: 真是令人发怵…不知道艾格勒是否也在注视着我们。
t_en: How chilling... I wonder if Aquila is also watching us.

t_ch: 记得雨之民提到过，它讨厌阴天。能否利用这点，改变画壁上的天气，影响「化身印记」的行为？
t_en: I remember the Rainfolk mentioned the Titan dislikes overcast days. We might be able to use this to our advantage and change how the mark is behaving by changing the weather on the mural?

t_ch: 这么做，不会对奥赫玛产生影响么？
t_en: Wouldn't this affect Okhema?

t_ch: 不必担心，恐怕天象画壁早已失去了以前的作用。奥赫玛的白天，倚仗的也是刻法勒背上的黎明机器。
t_en: Don't worry. The mural probably lost its original function ages ago. Okhema's light comes from the Dawn Device shouldered by Kephale anyway.

t_ch: …可这台装置似乎失去动力了。要改变画壁上的天象，得找到别处的浑象仪。
t_en: ...That being said, there's no power in this device anymore. We have to find another celestial globe if we want to change the weather on the mural.

t_ch: 啊，那边——那个圆盘形状的仪器，我倒是不陌生。
t_en: Ah, there — that circular device. I'm quite familiar with it.

t_ch: 那是昏光庭院的<color=#dbc291ff>「西风罗盘」，我们可以用它创造出供人行走的微缩彩虹桥。</color>说不定，能靠它前往晨昏之眼的其它区域。
t_en: That's a <color=#dbc291ff>West Wind Compass of the Twilight Courtyard. We can use it to create a miniature rainbow bridge to walk on.</color> Who knows, it might even lead us to other areas of the Eye of Twilight.

t_ch: 从黄金年代流传下来的技术，现在倒是能帮上我们的忙啦。走吧，调试和校准的工作就交给我。
t_en: Technology passed down from the golden age is finally proving useful. Let's go. Leave the adjustments and calibrations to me.

t_ch: 这下面，那一整池金色……
t_en: That huge golden pool down there...

t_ch: 滚烫的黄金池，据说是驱动晨昏之眼的神性能源。行走的时候，可要一直小心脚下呀。
t_en: A boiling pool of gold, said to be the energy source that powers the Eye of Twilight's divinity. You should watch your step as you walk.

t_ch: 嗯…机关结构和昏光庭院使用的有些不同。该怎么说呢…要更复杂一些。
t_en: Hmm... the mechanical structure is a bit different from the one used in the Twilight Courtyard. How should I put this... It's a little more complicated.

t_ch: 机制简化是大势所趋。
t_en: Mechanical simplification is the future.

t_ch: 有挑战性才好玩。
t_en: No fun if there's no challenge.

t_ch: 你能搞定吗，风堇？
t_en: Can you handle it, Hyacine?

t_ch: 可能要稍微花上一会儿…但我应该应付得来！
t_en: This might take a while... but I think I can manage!

t_ch: 看——彩虹桥出现了！
t_en: Look, the rainbow bridge has appeared!

t_ch: 干得好，现在我们可以通过……
t_en: Well done. Now we can cross...

t_ch: 喂，当心！
t_en: Hey, careful!

t_ch: 那是…？
t_en: That's...?

t_ch: 是敌人吗？
t_en: Is that an enemy?

t_ch: 是Boss吗？
t_en: Is that a boss?

t_ch: 是记忆体吗？
t_en: Is that a memory?

t_ch: 带翼的天马？
t_en: Is that a winged pegasus?

t_ch: 样子像是奇兽。但这一匹…似乎对我们没有敌意。
t_en: It looks like a mythical beast. But this one... doesn't seem hostile towards us.

t_ch: 啊——风堇，莫非它是传说里的……
t_en: Ahhh! Hyacine, could it be the legendary...

t_ch: 我…还无法确定。大概要接近一些才好判断。
t_en: I'm... not entirely sure. We might be able to tell if we get closer.

t_ch: 不能默认它会对我们友好。保持警惕，跟上去吧。
t_en: We can't assume it's friendly. Keep your guard up and follow it.

t_ch: 它…消失了？
t_en: It... disappeared?

t_ch: 是幻觉？还是记忆消散了？
t_en: An illusion? Or the memory dissipated?

t_ch: 好奇怪。那匹天马和其他记忆不一样，有一股哀伤缠绕着它……
t_en: How strange. That pegasus was different from the other memories. It was surrounded in an air of sorrow...

t_ch: …好沉重，压得人家喘不过气。
t_en: ...It's so heavy that it's hard to breathe.

t_ch: 这…是露奈比斯的幻影吗？它会出现在这里，是因为还有未完成的事吗？
t_en: Was that... Lunabis's phantom? Did it appear here because it has unfinished business?

t_ch: 若真是这样，维持它形体的执念一定十分强烈，难道是那位塞涅俄丝残存的意志？
t_en: If that's really the case, there must be a super strong obsession keeping it in one piece. Could it be some remaining bits of Seliose's will?

t_ch: 现在还无法确定。无论如何，我们先乘升降梯上到晨昏之眼的核心吧。
t_en: We can't be sure of that yet. Let's take the elevator up to the Eye of Twilight's core first.

t_ch: 小、小心呀！那一只不是记忆的幻影…它好像，还有生命的气息！
t_en: C—Careful! It's not a memory phantom... It looks like it's alive!

t_ch: 但…很扭曲，又很黑暗…就像那些黑潮怪物一样…！
t_en: But... it's so twisted, and very shadowy... like those black tide creatures...!

t_ch: 风堇，当心——
t_en: Hyacine, watch out!

t_ch: 果然，你就是露奈比斯阁下，对吗？
t_en: So, you're Lady Lunabis, aren't you?

t_ch: *嘶鸣*
t_en: *shrieking*

t_ch: 那，眼前这个正在被侵蚀折磨的生灵…一定就是索拉比斯阁下了。
t_en: Then... that corrupted being before us must be Lord Solabis.

t_ch: 你是为了帮助同伴解脱，才把我们引领到这里的吗？
t_en: Did you lead us here so we can free your companion?

t_ch: *嘶鸣*
t_en: *shrieking*

t_ch: …我明白了。
t_en: ...I understand now.

t_ch: *低吼*
t_en: *roaring*

t_ch: 你已经…被痛苦折磨很久了吧？但你没有放弃，还是拼命维持着一点自我，不愿屈服。
t_en: You must have been tormented by pain for so long. But you didn't give up, and you've held on to what little is left of your will with such tenacity.

t_ch: 别害怕，你不再孤单了。我是雅辛忒丝，继承了英雄血脉的医者——
t_en: Don't be afraid. You're not alone anymore. I am Hyacinthia, the healer who inherited the hero's bloodline...

t_ch: ——「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝，她曾是你们的伙伴，对吗？
t_en: ...Seliose the Daythunder Knight was once your comrade, wasn't she?

t_ch: *低吼*
t_en: *roaring*

t_ch: 索拉比斯阁下，你的躯壳已被黑潮彻底侵蚀。但我还可以…疗愈你顽强的灵魂，就像露奈比斯阁下一样，即便失去肉身，你的心灵也依旧高洁。
t_en: Lord Solabis, your body has been completely corroded by the black tide. But I can still... heal your tenacious soul. Just like Lady Lunabis — even if you've lost your mortal body, your spirit remains pure.

t_ch: 请牢牢抓住自己残存的意识，我会让你…以英魂的姿态再次苏醒。
t_en: Please keep holding on to what's left of your will. And I will... reawaken you as a heroic soul.

t_ch: *低吼*
t_en: *roaring*

t_ch: 不知道它能听懂多少。
t_en: I wonder how much it understood.

t_ch: 一定能听懂的…虽然深陷黑潮的苦痛，但它是位智慧而坚强的生灵。
t_en: It must have understood me... It's a creature of wisdom and tenacity, despite being mired in the agony of the black tide.

t_ch: 安抚结束，还是要靠球棒说话。
t_en: Words are done. Time for the bat to do the talking.

t_ch: 战斗无法避免，但我们不是为了摧毁…而是为了救赎。
t_en: This battle can't be avoided, but we do not do this for destruction... We do this for salvation.

t_ch: 需要手下留情吗？
t_en: Do we need to show mercy?

t_ch: 不必了，灰宝。索拉比斯不是随随便便就能战胜的对手。何况…它一定也期待着一场全力以赴的对决。
t_en: No need, Grayie. Solabis isn't an opponent that can be defeated easily. Besides... it must be looking forward to an all-out battle.

t_ch: 索拉比斯，传说中陪伴在英雄身边的「烈阳之翼」，如果这场战斗能让你回想起当年的伟绩，那会是我的荣幸……
t_en: Solabis, the Sunlit Wings that once accompanied the hero... If this battle can remind you of your great deeds from back then, it would be my honor...

t_ch: …来吧，英雄！
t_en: ...Come on, heroes!

t_ch: 结束了……
t_en: It's over...

t_ch: 索拉比斯……
t_en: Solabis...

t_ch: 马呀，你说话了！
t_en: Hold your horses, you're actually speaking!

t_ch: 不必惊讶吧？毕竟这是个粉红小狗都会说话的世界……
t_en: No need to be surprised. After all, this is a world where even a pink puppy can speak...

t_ch: 哎呀，怎么连人家都开始这么自称了！
t_en: Ugh, I can't believe I'm calling myself that now too!

t_ch: 你好，天马姐姐。
t_en: Hello, Sister Pegasus.

t_ch: 原来她会说话呀！
t_en: So she speaks!

t_ch: 索拉比斯…你终于苏醒了。
t_en: Solabis... You're finally awake.

t_ch: *低吼*
t_en: *roaring*

t_ch: 我的意识已经迷失了太久。终于，黑潮的囚笼被打开了。
t_en: My consciousness has been lost for far too long. Finally, I have been released from the black tide's cage.
